hero.title: Our Apps
hero.subtitle: Crafted with care to make your life easier

chaincheck.name: ChainCheck
chaincheck.description: ChainCheck is your all-in-one cycling companion. Track your rides with GPS, monitor component wear, and keep your bike in top shape with smart maintenance reminders powered by real sensor data.

features.ride_tracking: GPS ride tracking with detailed route recording
features.garage: Manage multiple bikes in your digital garage
features.components: Track component wear and replacement schedules
features.analytics: Ride analytics — distance, speed, elevation, and trends
features.maintenance: Smart maintenance alerts using gyroscope and accelerometer data

pawtfolio.name: Pawtfolio
pawtfolio.description: Pawtfolio is your all-in-one pet care manager. Create detailed profiles for your pets, track vaccinations and vet visits, monitor health and weight trends, manage expenses, and store important documents — all in one place, all on your device.

features.pet_profiles: Manage profiles for dogs, cats, and more with breed-specific details
features.vaccinations: Track vaccination schedules and get timely reminders
features.vet_visits: Log vet appointments and medical history
features.health: Monitor weight, health metrics, and wellness trends
features.expenses: Track pet care costs and insurance policies
features.documents: Store and organize important pet documents

intro.title: Introduction
intro.text: Nextia ("we", "us", or "our") built ChainCheck as a mobile application. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use our app. We are committed to protecting your privacy — we do not collect, store, or transmit your personal data to our servers.

data_collected.title: Information the App Uses
data_collected.text: ChainCheck accesses certain device data solely to provide its core features. All of this data remains on your device:
data_collected.location_text: Used to track your cycling rides and record GPS routes. Location data is processed entirely on your device and is never sent to our servers or any third party.
data_collected.sensors_text: Used to detect cycling patterns and determine when bike maintenance may be needed. This sensor data is processed locally on your device and is never transmitted externally.
data_collected.purchases_text: If you make in-app purchases, the transaction is processed by Apple (App Store) or Google (Google Play) and by our payment partner RevenueCat. We do not have access to your payment details. RevenueCat may process an anonymous app user ID to manage your subscription. See RevenueCat's Privacy Policy.

data_not_collected.title: Information We Do NOT Collect
data_not_collected.text: We want to be clear about what we do not do:

items.no_personal: We do not collect names, email addresses, or any personal identifiers
items.no_location_server: We do not send your location data to any server
items.no_sensor_server: We do not transmit sensor data (gyroscope, accelerometer) anywhere
items.no_analytics: We do not use third-party analytics or advertising SDKs that track you
items.no_sell: We do not sell, rent, or share any user data

data_storage.title: Data Storage & Deletion
data_storage.text: All your ride data, bike information, and app settings are stored locally on your device. You have full control over your data:

items.delete_app: Delete any ride, bike, or component data within the app at any time
items.uninstall: Uninstall the app to remove all associated data from your device
items.no_cloud: We do not maintain any cloud backup of your data

third_party.title: Third-Party Services
third_party.text: ChainCheck uses the following third-party services:

items.revenuecat: RevenueCat — manages in-app subscriptions and purchases. Processes anonymous transaction data. Privacy Policy
items.apple: Apple App Store / Google Play Store — handles app distribution and payment processing according to their own privacy policies

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.text: ChainCheck is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect any information from children. Since no personal data is collected from any user, there is no risk of children's data being compromised.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. We encourage you to review this page periodically.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

intro.title: Introduction
intro.text: Nextia ("we", "us", or "our") built Pawtfolio as a mobile application. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use our app. We are committed to protecting your privacy — we do not collect, store, or transmit your personal data to our servers.

data_collected.title: Information the App Uses
data_collected.text: Pawtfolio accesses certain device capabilities solely to provide its core features. All of your data remains on your device:
data_collected.notifications_text: Used to send you reminders for vaccinations, vet appointments, and pet care events. Notification scheduling is handled entirely on your device and no data is sent to any server.
data_collected.purchases_text: If you make in-app purchases, the transaction is processed by Apple (App Store) or Google (Google Play) and by our payment partner RevenueCat. We do not have access to your payment details. RevenueCat may process an anonymous app user ID to manage your subscription. See RevenueCat's Privacy Policy.

data_not_collected.title: Information We Do NOT Collect
data_not_collected.text: We want to be clear about what we do not do:

items.no_personal: We do not collect names, email addresses, or any personal identifiers
items.no_pet_data_server: We do not send your pet data to any server
items.no_photos_server: We do not upload photos or documents to any external service
items.no_analytics: We do not use third-party analytics or advertising SDKs that track you
items.no_sell: We do not sell, rent, or share any user data

data_storage.title: Data Storage & Deletion
data_storage.text: All your pet profiles, health records, documents, and app settings are stored locally on your device. You have full control over your data:

items.delete_app: Delete any pet profile, record, or document within the app at any time
items.uninstall: Uninstall the app to remove all associated data from your device
items.no_cloud: We do not maintain any cloud backup of your data

third_party.title: Third-Party Services
third_party.text: Pawtfolio uses the following third-party services:

items.revenuecat: RevenueCat — manages in-app subscriptions and purchases. Processes anonymous transaction data. Privacy Policy
items.apple: Apple App Store / Google Play Store — handles app distribution and payment processing according to their own privacy policies

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.text: Pawtfolio is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect any information from children. Since no personal data is collected from any user, there is no risk of children's data being compromised.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. We encourage you to review this page periodically.

contact.text: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
